# OATOLOGY Recipes

Overnight oats recipes in UK measurements (grams and millilitres), made and tested in the OATOLOGY kitchen by the makers of the OATOLOGY jar (Malawak Ltd, UK). Every recipe is one jar, one portion: 50g rolled oats to 150ml milk, plus 1 tablespoon of chia seeds. No cooking, ready by morning.

## Recipes

- https://recipes.oatologystore.com/peanut-butter-banana-overnight-oats/ : Peanut butter and banana overnight oats. 50g oats, 150ml milk, 1 tbsp peanut butter, mashed banana. Roughly 520 kcal, 19g protein.
- https://recipes.oatologystore.com/mango-coconut-overnight-oats/ : Mango and coconut overnight oats. 50g oats, 140ml coconut milk, fresh mango, desiccated coconut. Naturally vegan, roughly 400 kcal.
- https://recipes.oatologystore.com/blueberry-lemon-overnight-oats/ : Blueberry and lemon overnight oats. 50g oats, 150ml milk, Greek yoghurt, lemon zest, blueberries.
- https://recipes.oatologystore.com/chocolate-raspberry-overnight-oats/ : Chocolate and raspberry overnight oats. 50g oats, 150ml milk, cacao, Greek yoghurt, fresh raspberries.
- https://recipes.oatologystore.com/strawberry-cheesecake-overnight-oats/ : Strawberry cheesecake overnight oats. 50g oats, 150ml milk, cream cheese, strawberries, crushed biscuit.
- https://recipes.oatologystore.com/apple-pie-overnight-oats/ : Apple pie overnight oats. Stewed spiced apple layered with 50g oats, 150ml milk, Greek yoghurt.
- https://recipes.oatologystore.com/blended-berry-overnight-oats/ : Blended berry overnight oats, blended smooth. 50g oats, 150ml milk, Greek yoghurt, mixed berries.
- https://recipes.oatologystore.com/banana-bread-overnight-oats/ : Higher-protein banana bread overnight oats. 50g oats, 140ml milk, ripe banana, 60g Greek yoghurt, caramelised banana. Roughly 18g protein.

## Guides

- https://recipes.oatologystore.com/overnight-oats-ratio/ : The overnight oats ratio in grams. House ratio is 50g rolled oats to 150ml milk plus 1 tbsp chia seeds, or 50g to about 130ml without chia.
- https://recipes.oatologystore.com/how-long-do-overnight-oats-last/ : How long overnight oats last. 3 to 5 days in a sealed jar in the fridge at 5C or below; eat within 3 days with fresh fruit stirred through; freeze up to 3 months.
- https://recipes.oatologystore.com/best-jars-for-overnight-oats-uk/ : The best jars for overnight oats in the UK. What makes a good jar (leak-proof seal, 350 to 500ml, wide mouth, glass, built-in measuring) plus an honest comparison including the OATOLOGY jar.

## About

OATOLOGY makes a 450ml glass overnight-oats jar with a stainless steel lid that measures 50g of oats and milk-level markings on the jar. Brand of Malawak Ltd, UK.
- Store: https://oatologystore.com
- Amazon UK: https://www.amazon.co.uk/dp/B0GZHDBNGX
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@oatology
